scale.h1: text-4xl md:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter font-semibold text-white
scale.h2: text-2xl md:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight font-medium text-white

surfaces_and_glassmorphism.glass_panel_primary: bg-[#0B1120]/60 backdrop-blur-2xl border border-white/10 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)] rounded-2xl
surfaces_and_glassmorphism.glow_effect: relative before:absolute before:-inset-0.5 before:bg-gradient-to-r before:from-[#00E5FF] before:to-[#0055FF] before:rounded-xl before:blur-md before:opacity-30 before:-z-10

split_screen.left_visual: hidden lg:flex lg:w-1/2 relative overflow-hidden items-center justify-center p-12
split_screen.right_form: w-full lg:w-1/2 flex items-center justify-center p-8 sm:p-12 lg:p-24 bg-[#060814] relative z-10

dashboard.sidebar: fixed inset-y-0 left-0 z-50 flex flex-col bg-[#0B1120]/80 backdrop-blur-2xl border-r border-white/10 transition-all duration-300
dashboard.topbar: sticky top-0 z-40 w-full h-16 flex items-center justify-between px-6 bg-[#0B1120]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10
dashboard.main_content: flex-1 flex flex-col overflow-hidden pl-0 transition-all duration-300
dashboard.bento_grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-6 p-6

animations.background_particles: Use react-tsparticles for subtle floating cyan/blue shapes in the auth left panel background.

gamification_specs.progress_circles: Use stroke-dasharray/stroke-dashoffset SVGs wrapped in framer-motion for smooth circular progress bars. Color: gradient from #00E5FF to #0055FF.
gamification_specs.badges: Glassmorphism containers with floating 3D icons, heavy drop-shadows using #FFC800 (gold) or #00E5FF (cyan) for glow.
gamification_specs.streak_indicator: Use fire icon with animated orange/red gradient text fill, glowing border.

auth_illustration_admin.description: Abstract blue light streaks forming a tunnel effect, perfect for Admin auth panel.

auth_illustration_instructor.description: Smiling man with glasses in front of chalkboard, ideal for Instructor auth panel.

auth_illustration_student.description: Group of students gathered around a laptop, ideal for Student auth panel.

dashboard_hero_banner.description: Dark blue abstract background with soft geometric shapes for dashboard top headers.

course_ai_thumbnail.description: Artificial Intelligence abstract blue network thumbnail.

gamification_abstract.description: 3D floating shapes for gamified empty states or badge placeholders.

component_strategies.forms: Use Shadcn UI customized with bg-transparent/5, white text, and cyan focus rings. Label text should be text-sm font-medium text-[#A0ABC0].
component_strategies.buttons: Primary buttons: bg-gradient-to-r from-[#00E5FF] to-[#0055FF] text-white font-semibold shadow-[0_4px_14px_0_rgba(0,229,255,0.39)] hover:shadow-[0_6px_20px_rgba(0,229,255,0.23)] hover:-translate-y-0.5 transition duration-200. Secondary: bg-white/5 border border-white/10 hover:bg-white/10.
component_strategies.tables: Shadcn Table customized with transparent headers, border-b border-white/5, text-sm text-[#A0ABC0] for rows, text-white for key identifiers.
component_strategies.charts: Recharts. Use <ResponsiveContainer>. Tooltip must be customized with glassmorphism bg (#0B1120/80 backdrop-blur) and white/10 borders. Line/Bar colors must use primary gradient colors.
component_strategies.icons: Use lucide-react. Stroke width 1.5 for elegance.

testing.attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="admin-login-button"`).

general_instructions_for_main_agent: Install and use 'framer-motion' for all page transitions and complex micro-interactions.
Install and use 'react-tsparticles' for the animated background in the split-screen auth layouts.
Do NOT use 'Inter' or 'Roboto'. Inject Google Fonts 'Outfit' and 'Plus Jakarta Sans' via index.css.
Always apply optical alignment over strict geometric centering for asymmetric content.
Strictly follow the JSON media URLs—do NOT use placeholders (via.placeholder.com).
Implement the collapsible sidebar with Radix UI Tooltips (Shadcn Tooltip) for icon-only mode.
Keep spacing generous (p-6, p-8) and avoid cramped layouts.
